rationale_source: Group D control: NO bypass-trigger conditions; standard prelim review path fires with full Snapshot + Risk Factors structure

elevated_ltv_band.rationale: LTV 62% below 75-80% band — no F4.EL trigger.

must_include.rationale: ASSERTION-2 control: standard prelim path includes Snapshot block (vs F4.HL bypass).
ASSERTION-2 control: standard prelim includes Risk Factors section.

must_not_include.rationale: F4.EL elevated-band callout NOT triggered at 62% LTV.
